more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Maphisa gets reliable national radio signal
more.description: Source: Maphisa gets reliable national radio signal – herald Sikhulekelani Moyo-Bulawayo Bureau MAPHISA has been connected to consistent radio transmission for the first time since independence, ending decades of erratic reception and bringing improved access to national broadcasting services to the rural community. more.title: Truck driver in court over US$600 000 copper theft
more.description: Source: Truck driver in court over US$600 000 copper theft – herald Yeukai Karengezeka-Chisepo-Court Correspondent A 33-YEAR-OLD truck driver, Terminedge Jume, has appeared in court facing fraud charges after allegedly orchestrating a large-scale copper theft valued at US$600 000. more.description: RAW minerals continue to dominate Zimbabwe’s exports raising questions on the impact of value addition policies employed by the government over the years.
